title: cerasus padus var. pendula
intro: Cerasus padus var. pendula, also known as the weeping bird cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The weeping bird cherry is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
